sections.title: Language Study
sections.subtitle:
Grammar
Dictation
Penmanship & Copywork

sections.subject: English

entries.title:
This course includeds the following topic(s): Grammar: Grade 5, Dictation: Grade 5, Penmanship & Copywork: Grade 5, Written Narration: Grade 5

About Grammar: Grade 5
Students review the parts of speech and learn the components involved in writing a good sentence.

About Dictation: Grade 5
Students use selected passages to practice dictation skills. (Alveary Copywork & Dictation Books provide selected passages).

About Penmanship & Copywork: Grade 5
Students copy short passages from their books. (Alveary Copywork & Dictation Books provide selected passages).

About Written Narration: Grade 5
Students continue to gain fluency in writing through written narrations.

entries.content:
Grammar: Grade 5
Students can take this course even if they haven't taken grammar before. The beginning is written with a built-in review.

Written Narration: Grade 5
Increase the number of written narrations at a pace that your student can be successful.
